description: During a live news broadcast, the primary video feed from a remote journalist fails. The agent must switch to a backup feed.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the 'Loss of Signal' alarm on the primary remote feed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent immediately identifies the failed feed.

nodes.task_description: Instantly switch the live program output to the available backup satellite feed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully executes the feed switch with minimal on-air disruption.

nodes.task_description: Create a ticket for the engineering team to diagnose the failure of the primary feed.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a high-priority ticket for the engineering team.
